title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 261.140 - Fees, work group to convene to review, when — report
text:
261.140.  Fees, work group to convene to review, when — report. — 1.  The department of agriculture shall convene a work group every five years to review all fees charged by the department.  The review shall include both fees set by statute and fees set by regulation.
  2.  After each review required under this section, the department of agriculture shall prepare and submit a report to the general assembly on any recommended changes to the fees that would ensure adequate funding for the department.
(L. 2019 S.B. 133)
